title: CATCH /cót/ PEGAR/ CAPTURAR
definition: To capture or grab \br irregular \br catch; caught; caught
example1: I catch the ball. \br He caught a cold. \br The thief has been caught.

title: TEACH /tót/ ENSINAR
definition: To instruct \br irregular \br teach; taught; taught
example1: I teach English. \br She taught me to swim. \br He has been taught to be polite.

title: FIGHT /fót/ LUTAR
definition: To struggle against \br irregular \br fight; fought; fought
example1: They fight sometimes. \br He fought in a war. \br The battle has been fought.
